mentions.note: Caller Pete rotating Nike loss into Levi; Cramer likes at 23-24, credits CEO Michelle for good job. Clear buy recommendation.

Turnaround story under CEO Michelle Gass; Q1 beat with 9% organic growth vs. 4.5% expected; strong DTC/e-commerce growth. Trades 15x current earnings vs. peers at 20-25x; upside to valuation compression.
Consistently delivering solid earnings yet stock stuck ~$19; CEO Michelle Gass expected to impress again next Tuesday; needs more respect from market despite 3% yield and respectable growth.
Consistently delivering solid earnings yet stock stuck ~$19; CEO Michelle Gass expected to impress again next Tuesday; 3% yield; respectable growth but lacks market respect.

DTC momentum (10% growth, 22% ecom) and women's expansion (38% sales, growing 11% YoY) to drive 4-6% organic growth. Tariff uncertainty pressures stock despite solid results; Super Bowl/World Cup partnerships expected to lift brand momentum.
